## P8.1A Recommended Cloud Configuration Baseline

- Use managed identity / Key Vault / app settings for cloud secrets.
- Do not configure SqlOperationalQueueExecutor:RunId outside short-lived debug runs.
- Required cloud setting: ConnectionStrings:MigrationOperationalStore or equivalent provider-backed connection string.
- Required worker settings: SqlOperationalQueueExecutor:Enabled, WorkerId, BatchSize, LeaseSeconds, PollDelaySeconds, RunUntilIdleAndStop=false.
- Production should set SqlOperationalMigrationJobExecutor:Enabled only when connector/job execution configuration is ready.
